name: DESIGN.md — Zama Confidential Hub
tagline: A confidential-token wallet and DeFi tool on Zama's FHE / ERC-7984 stack.
description:
Design system for the Zama cToken app: a confidential-token wallet + DeFi tool on Zama's FHE / ERC-7984 stack (Sepolia testnet). Users shield public ERC-20 tokens into confidential counterparts, unshield back, send confidentially, decrypt encrypted balances, and mint from faucets — over a browsable registry of official confidential wrappers plus custom pairs.

Product surface: a left-sidebar app shell (Dashboard, Faucet, Shield/Unshield, Send, Activity). Actions live in centered cards/forms, never a marketing landing page. Core screens are a wallet dashboard (total balance, asset list with price/balance/value, per-asset detail modal) and a swap-style Shield/Unshield card ("You shield" → "You receive").

Visual identity: dark, near-black shell with a single bold Zama-yellow accent. Confidential tokens carry a shield badge; encrypted balances that aren't decrypted yet show as "****", never a fake zero. High-contrast, fintech-precise, no decorative fluff.
provenance: Colors, type, radius and layout re-measured from the app's own src/styles.css and config (officialPairs.ts, prices.ts, tokenIcons.ts) in the AI Optimize pass. Extended surface/border/status roles and OKLCH values added; base foreground/background roles corrected (the app is a dark shell: canvas #000000, text #f4f4f1). Values marked 'inferred' were not directly measured.

logo.notes: Real Zama brand icon shipped in the app's /public. Rendered in the sidebar on a #ffd208 rounded tile. No wordmark supplied by source.

colors.name: Zama yellow
colors.usage: primary actions, active state, emphasis — one accent only

colors.name: Accent tint
colors.usage: active step / selected chip wash (8–10% alpha)

body.notes: Base 15px / 1.5. Single family display+body is intentional (tech/utility posture).

mono.notes: Addresses, tx hashes, token amounts and the encrypted **** mask.

voice.tone: Direct, expert, calm. Action-first. States the current action plainly; never overhypes, never leaks. Trust and privacy are the through-line.
messagingPillars: Confidential by default — shield public ERC-20 into ERC-7984 counterparts; encrypted balances stay encrypted until you decrypt.
Verb-first control — every action is a plain verb: Shield, Unshield, Send, Decrypt, Mint.
Testnet-honest — Sepolia only, mock tokens, real flows; blocking reasons are always stated on the control itself.

avoid: fake zero for an undecrypted balance

imagery.style: Iconographic, not photographic. Monoline stroke icons (Lucide-style, ~2px) for nav and actions; filled shield glyph for the confidential badge.
imagery.treatment: Token logos render as circular avatars on #0d0d0d with a 1px #3a3a3a ring; confidential variants add a shield badge on its own dark disc so it stays legible over any logo color.

postureRules: Fixed left sidebar (~248px): brand mark top, primary nav, wallet control pinned to the bottom.
Actions live in centered cards/forms (max ~560px), never a full-bleed marketing layout.
One accent only (#ffd208), used sparingly — primary button, active nav, active step; never a large wash.
Every action CTA is disabled with its blocking reason in the label until wallet is connected on Sepolia.
Encrypted balances render **** in mono; decrypt reveals via a permit-then-decrypt step.
Dark, high-contrast (WCAG AA); visible focus rings; aria labels on icon-only buttons; 44px min hit targets.

tokenRegistry.note: Official confidential pairs shipped with the app; logos are real files in assets/tokens/.
